<!doctype html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Guardiao Dose Ozempic</title>


<meta property="og:title" content="Guardiao Dose Ozempic">

<meta property="og:type" content="website">

<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary">

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;border-width:0;border-style:solid}
  html{min-height:100%;scroll-behavior:smooth}
  body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;overflow-y:auto;padding:0}
  body{-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;font-feature-settings:"ss01","cv11";text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}
  .sales-preview{display:block!important;height:auto!important;min-height:100vh!important;overflow:visible!important;width:100%!important}
  .sales-preview>[data-section-kind]{display:block!important;position:relative}
  h1,h2,h3,h4{font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:-0.025em}
  :where(h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6,p,blockquote,figure,dl,dd){margin:0}
  :where(ul,ol){margin:0;padding:0}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block}
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:inherit}
  button,input,textarea,select{font:inherit}
  details summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
.sales-preview .sales-smart-grid,
.sales-preview .sales-testimonials-grid,
.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-testimonials-grid,
.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-smart-grid {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-smart-grid,
  .sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-smart-grid {
    grid-template-columns: var(--sales-desktop-grid-template, repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)));
  }

  .sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-testimonials-grid,
  .sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-testimonials-grid {
    grid-template-columns: var(--sales-testimonials-desktop-grid-template, repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)));
  }
}

.sales-media-frame {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-media-frame,
.sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-media-frame {
  max-width: min(100%, 580px) !important;
}

.sales-pricing-section,
.sales-pricing-card {
  overflow: visible !important;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.sales-pricing-media {
  margin-top: calc(clamp(-104px, -9.5vw, -58px) + var(--sales-pricing-image-offset-y, 0px)) !important;
  margin-bottom: clamp(-10px, -1.2vw, -4px) !important;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3 !important;
  transform: translateY(calc(clamp(-12px, -1.4vw, -6px) + var(--sales-pricing-image-offset-y, 0px)));
  filter: drop-shadow(0 22px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22));
}

.sales-rich-text :where(h1, h2, h3, p) {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-weight: inherit !important;
  letter-spacing: inherit;
  margin: 0;
}

.sales-rich-text h1 {
  font-size: var(--sales-rich-text-h1-size, 1.35em);
  line-height: var(--sales-rich-text-heading-line-height, 1.12);
}

.sales-rich-text h2 {
  font-size: var(--sales-rich-text-h2-size, 1.18em);
  line-height: var(--sales-rich-text-heading-line-height, 1.18);
}

.sales-rich-text h3 {
  font-size: var(--sales-rich-text-h3-size, 1.05em);
  line-height: var(--sales-rich-text-heading-line-height, 1.22);
}

.sales-rich-text .ql-align-center {
  text-align: center;
}

.sales-rich-text .ql-align-left {
  text-align: left;
}

.sales-rich-text .ql-align-right {
  text-align: right;
}

.sales-rich-text .ql-align-justify {
  text-align: justify;
}

.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-hero-headline,
.sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-hero-headline {
  font-size: calc(var(--sales-hero-title-size, 32px) * 1.18) !important;
}

.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-hero-subheadline,
.sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-hero-subheadline {
  font-size: calc(var(--sales-hero-subtitle-size, 17px) * 1.1) !important;
}

.sales-checklist-item .sales-rich-text {
  font-size: inherit !important;
}

.sales-countdown-grid {
  --sales-countdown-cell-block-padding: calc(clamp(8px, 2.4vw, 14px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1));
  --sales-countdown-cell-inline-padding: calc(clamp(4px, 1.8vw, 10px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1));
  --sales-countdown-gap: calc(clamp(4px, 1.6vw, 10px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1));
  --sales-countdown-max-cell-width: calc(
    (100cqw - (var(--sales-countdown-columns, 4) - 1) * var(--sales-countdown-gap)) /
      var(--sales-countdown-columns, 4)
  );
  container-type: inline-size;
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--sales-countdown-gap);
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  width: 100%;
}

.sales-countdown-cell {
  flex: 0 1 min(
    max(
      calc(92px * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1)),
      calc(var(--sales-countdown-number-size, 34px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1) * 1.55)
    ),
    var(--sales-countdown-max-cell-width)
  );
  box-sizing: border-box;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sales-countdown-value {
  font-size: clamp(
    12px,
    min(
      calc(var(--sales-countdown-number-size, 34px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1)),
      calc(
        (var(--sales-countdown-max-cell-width) - (var(--sales-countdown-cell-inline-padding) * 2)) /
          1.14
      )
    ),
    calc(var(--sales-countdown-number-size, 34px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1))
  ) !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: clip !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  word-break: keep-all !important;
}

.sales-countdown-cell [data-label-unit] {
  font-size: clamp(9px, calc(var(--sales-countdown-label-size, 11px) * var(--sales-countdown-scale, 1)), 38px) !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  word-break: keep-all !important;
}

.sales-button-cta {
  cursor: pointer;
  min-height: 52px;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  transition:
    opacity 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
    transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
    box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
}

.sales-button-section {
  overflow: visible !important;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.sales-preview[data-sales-device="mobile"] .sales-button-cta[data-full-width="true"] {
  --sales-button-full-max-width: 100%;
}

.sales-preview[data-sales-device="desktop"] .sales-button-cta[data-full-width="true"],
.sales-preview:not([data-sales-device="mobile"]) .sales-button-cta[data-full-width="true"] {
  --sales-button-full-max-width: 560px;
}

.sales-button-cta[data-button-style="step"] {
  box-shadow:
    0 7px 0 var(--sales-button-step-color),
    0 16px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.sales-button-cta[data-button-style="step"]:active {
  box-shadow:
    0 2px 0 var(--sales-button-step-color),
    0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16);
  transform: translateY(2px);
}

.sales-button-cta[data-animated="true"] {
  animation: sales-button-pulse 2400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) infinite;
}

.sales-button-cta[data-animated="true"][data-button-style="step"] {
  animation-name: sales-button-step-pulse;
}

.sales-arrows {
  --sales-arrow-move-x: 0px;
  --sales-arrow-move-y: 8px;
}

.sales-arrows[data-direction="up"] {
  --sales-arrow-move-y: -8px;
}

.sales-arrows[data-direction="left"] {
  --sales-arrow-move-x: -8px;
  --sales-arrow-move-y: 0px;
}

.sales-arrows[data-direction="right"] {
  --sales-arrow-move-x: 8px;
  --sales-arrow-move-y: 0px;
}

.sales-arrows[data-animated="true"][data-animation-style="flow"] .sales-arrow-icon {
  animation: sales-arrow-flow 1200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) infinite;
}

.sales-arrows[data-animated="true"][data-animation-style="bounce"] .sales-arrow-icon {
  animation: sales-arrow-bounce 900ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) infinite;
}

.sales-arrows[data-animated="true"][data-animation-style="pulse"] .sales-arrow-icon {
  animation: sales-arrow-pulse 1050ms ease-in-out infinite;
}

.sales-purchase-toast {
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: var(--sales-purchase-bg, #111827);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--sales-purchase-text, #ffffff) 16%, transparent);
  border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 55px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  color: var(--sales-purchase-text, #ffffff);
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  max-width: min(calc(100vw - 28px), 360px);
  min-width: min(calc(100vw - 28px), 300px);
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  pointer-events: none;
  position: fixed;
  transform: translate3d(0, 12px, 0) scale(0.98);
  transition:
    opacity 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
    transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
  z-index: 2147483000;
}

.sales-purchase-toast[data-visible="true"] {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1);
}

.sales-purchase-toast[data-position="bottom-left"] {
  bottom: 18px;
  left: 18px;
}

.sales-purchase-toast[data-position="bottom-right"] {
  bottom: 18px;
  right: 18px;
}

.sales-purchase-toast[data-position="top-left"] {
  left: 18px;
  top: 18px;
}

.sales-purchase-toast[data-position="top-right"] {
  right: 18px;
  top: 18px;
}

.sales-purchase-toast-icon {
  align-items: center;
  background: var(--sales-purchase-accent, #22c55e);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: #ffffff;
  display: flex;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
  height: 28px;
  justify-content: center;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-top: 1px;
  width: 28px;
}

.sales-purchase-toast-content {
  min-width: 0;
}

.sales-purchase-toast-title {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.sales-purchase-toast-message {
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.35;
  margin-top: 2px;
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.sales-purchase-toast-time {
  color: var(--sales-purchase-accent, #22c55e);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-top: 7px;
}

@media (hover: hover) {
  .sales-button-cta:not([data-animated="true"]):hover {
    opacity: 0.92;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .sales-button-cta:not([data-animated="true"])[data-button-style="step"]:hover {
    box-shadow:
      0 9px 0 var(--sales-button-step-color),
      0 20px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    transform: translateY(-5px);
  }
}

@keyframes sales-arrow-flow {
  0%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0.72;
    transform: translate(0, 0) scale(0.96);
  }
  45% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate(var(--sales-arrow-move-x), var(--sales-arrow-move-y)) scale(1.08);
  }
}

@keyframes sales-arrow-bounce {
  0%,
  100% {
    transform: translate(0, 0);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translate(var(--sales-arrow-move-x), var(--sales-arrow-move-y)) scale(1.06);
  }
}

@keyframes sales-arrow-pulse {
  0%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0.68;
    transform: scale(0.92);
  }
  50% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1.12);
  }
}

@keyframes sales-button-pulse {
  0%,
  100% {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.025);
  }
}

@keyframes sales-button-step-pulse {
  0%,
  100% {
    transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.018);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .sales-button-cta,
  .sales-arrows .sales-arrow-icon,
  .sales-purchase-toast {
    animation: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }
}
	</style>

</head>

<script>
(function () {
  function pad(value) {
    return String(Math.max(0, value)).padStart(2, "0");
  }

  function updateCountdown(countdown) {
    var target = resolveCountdownTarget(countdown);
    var total = Number.isFinite(target) ? Math.max(0, target - Date.now()) : 0;
    var totalSeconds = Math.floor(total / 1000);
    var values = {
      days: Math.floor(totalSeconds / 86400),
      hours: Math.floor((totalSeconds % 86400) / 3600),
      minutes: Math.floor((totalSeconds % 3600) / 60),
      seconds: totalSeconds % 60
    };

    Object.keys(values).forEach(function (unit) {
      var el = countdown.querySelector('[data-unit="' + unit + '"]');
      if (el) el.textContent = pad(values[unit]);
    });

    var expired = countdown.querySelector(".sales-countdown-expired");
    if (expired) expired.style.display = total <= 0 ? "block" : "none";
  }

  function resolveCountdownTarget(countdown) {
    var resolved = Number(countdown.getAttribute("data-countdown-resolved-target") || "0");
    if (Number.isFinite(resolved) && resolved > 0) return resolved;

    var mode = countdown.getAttribute("data-countdown-mode") || "fixed";
    if (mode === "automatic") {
      var key = countdown.getAttribute("data-countdown-storage-key") || "";
      var stored = 0;
      try {
        stored = key ? Number(window.localStorage.getItem(key) || "0") : 0;
      } catch (_error) {
        stored = 0;
      }
      if (Number.isFinite(stored) && stored > 0) {
        countdown.setAttribute("data-countdown-resolved-target", String(stored));
        return stored;
      }

      var durationSeconds = Number(countdown.getAttribute("data-countdown-duration-seconds") || "1200");
      if (!Number.isFinite(durationSeconds) || durationSeconds <= 0) durationSeconds = 1200;
      var automaticTarget = Date.now() + Math.round(durationSeconds * 1000);
      countdown.setAttribute("data-countdown-resolved-target", String(automaticTarget));
      try {
        if (key) window.localStorage.setItem(key, String(automaticTarget));
      } catch (_error) {
        // localStorage can be unavailable in strict browser modes; the in-page target still works.
      }
      return automaticTarget;
    }

    var targetValue = countdown.getAttribute("data-countdown-target") || "";
    var fixedTarget = new Date(targetValue).getTime();
    countdown.setAttribute("data-countdown-resolved-target", String(fixedTarget));
    return fixedTarget;
  }

  var countdowns = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(".sales-countdown[data-countdown-target]"));
  if (countdowns.length === 0) return;
  countdowns.forEach(updateCountdown);
  window.setInterval(function () {
    countdowns.forEach(updateCountdown);
  }, 1000);
})();
</script>


</body>
</html>
